text_en: To be honest, painting is more than just a hobby to me; it is a way to relax after a long day. Whenever I pick up a brush, I feel completely at peace. I love playing with different colors to create beautiful pictures of nature, animals, and even my family members. What I love most is that painting helps me express my feelings without using any words. It’s like a quiet conversation with myself. Sometimes, I give my favorite pieces to my friends as small gifts. Seeing their smiles makes me feel even more motivated. In short, this creative hobby not only brings me joy but also helps me stay positive and creative in everything I do.
